MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID KESTENBAUM, Esq. of Grotefeld Hoffmann (Tel: 415-344-9670) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ROUND THE CLOCK PEST CONTROL, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Round the Clock Pest Control, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to set aside and vacate default" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
